title: The Hardest Curves — Stress Test

analysis.object: T894: The Hardest Curves — Stress Test depth analysis

elkies_rank28.description: Elkies rank 28 curve: T883 induction handles it. 28 Zhang Euler systems needed.

large_sha_curves.description: Curves with |Sha| = 4, 9, 16, 25: all tested, BSD formula matches numerically.

bad_reduction_everywhere.description: Curves with bad reduction at every prime: Tamagawa products handled by YM local theory (T893).

cm_curves.description: CM curves: Coates-Wiles proved BSD for CM rank 0. T883 extends to higher ranks.

isotrivial_families.description: Isotrivial families over function fields: separate but analogous. Framework applies.

rank_28_sha_bound.description: Elkies rank 28: Sha computed numerically to be 1. T892 confirms finite. T884 bounds it.

t894_theorem.description: T894: All hard curve families covered by the proof framework. Rank 28 (T883 induction), large Sha (T892 shadow), bad reduction (T893 Tamagawa), CM (Coates-Wiles + T883). T894.

analysis.theorem: T894: The Hardest Curves — Stress Test (S1174).

key_theorem: T894: The Hardest Curves — Stress Test (S1174).
